title: ESCC spatial-to-bulk validation framework
description: Clean-text analysis code and reproducibility materials for a public-data spatial-to-bulk validation framework in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma. The archive contains public-data analysis scripts, configuration files, manifests and processed supporting tables.

creators.name: Yang, Haoshui
creators.affiliation: Department of Pathology, The First Affiliated Hospital of Xinjiang Medical University, Urumqi, China
